_notes: All roles default to GEMINI_API_KEY -- one free key is enough at a few-hours-between-turns cadence. GM/God/DM adjudication use gemini-3.5-flash since they carry the most judgment load (following 'don't reveal unless triggered', telling confabulation apart from legitimate divergent belief); players use gemini-3.1-flash-lite since a wrong guess there just becomes an in-character choice, not a broken pipeline. Both are free-tier as of writing -- Gemini's free-tier model list changes often, so if a model name here 404s, check the current model list rather than assuming the code broke. To split quota across separate keys later: change a role's api_key_env to something like GEMINI_API_KEY_PLAYER_A and add that as a second GitHub secret -- but remember a second key only helps if it's from a different Google Cloud project than the first.
